company.name: Tavyn
company.product_summary: Tavyn is an email-first SEO blog workflow agent for founder-led SaaS teams.
company.product_angle: Tavyn positions itself as an email-first SEO operations agent for founder-led SaaS teams, handling planning, briefs, drafting, and publishing with minimal workflow overhead.

primary_icp.name: founder-led SaaS teams
primary_icp.description: Lean SaaS teams led by founders who want to manage SEO content without a heavy blog workflow.

primary_differentiators.title: Email-first workflow
primary_differentiators.description: Users can approve, revise, and review content from inbox instead of managing a heavy dashboard workflow.

primary_differentiators.title: Founder-context-driven content creation
primary_differentiators.description: The product explicitly learns product, customer, positioning, competitors, and search visibility before deciding.

primary_differentiators.title: GitHub-based publishing readiness
primary_differentiators.description: Content is delivered as publish-ready and pushed through GitHub pull requests.

primary_differentiators.title: Built for lean founder-led SaaS teams
primary_differentiators.description: The product explicitly rejects large editorial workflows and is optimized for smaller teams.

company.category_point_of_view: SaaS SEO should be run as an end-to-end workflow that combines search research, founder expertise, and publish-ready execution rather than isolated writing tasks.
